seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: SIMPLE TO OPERATE Simple button and dial operation, clear sound AM/FM radio and large LED display make this easy for all to enjoy. The simple black design will fit well with any home décor and the large LED display is clear to see at any time of day or night

MULTIPLE FEATURES The LLOYTRON "Daybreak" Alarm Clock features a sleep timer countdown to keep the AM/FM radio on for a set time, a snooze button for a more relaxed awakening, plus rotary volume and tuning controls to adjust to your preferred settings

SLEEP TIMER AND SNOOZE The sleep timer is ideal for those who don't like to fall asleep to silence as it will automatically turn off the radio after a set time up to 2 hours. The large central snooze button lets you enjoy those precious extra few minutes in bed before the alarm sounds again

LED CLOCK DISPLAY The large bright red LED display can be set as a 12 or 24 hour clock and is clearly visible any time of day or night. It's clear enough to see from your bedside table when waking up in low light and large enough to see from across the room whilst you're up and about

MAINS POWERED WITH BACK-UP BATTERY With the back-up battery power, you have the assurance that should there be a power cut your Digital Alarm Clock will continue to operate ensuring you don't miss that important wake up call when power has resumed. Requires 1 x 9v battery (not included)
Product may vary slightly from that shown in the photos
description: The LLOYTRON "Daybreak" Alarm Clock Radio has a built-in sleep timer allowing you to set up to a 2 hour countdown until the radio switches off, an easy press large central snooze button for a more relaxed awakening and simple to use rotary volume and tuning controls to adjust the sound level and the AM/FM radio station to your liking. It's simple to operate with button and dial controls as well as a large LED display. The simple design is suitable to be used by all and the traditional style red LED 12/24 hour display shows the time clearly enough that it can be seen from across the room. This alarm clock radio has a back-up battery port as well as plug-in mains operation. Batteries act as an alternate source of power so the clock won't reset if mains power is ever lost. (Requires 1 x 9v battery not included). Package includes: 1 x LLOYTRON "Daybreak" Alarm Clock Radio in Black 1 x Instruction manual. Note: This clock radio has a manual tuning radio, which if knocked or hit may change frequency, just like any manual radio. The radio is also dependent upon the location of the user to the signal mast. If there is interference then this is down to the users locale.
